retrieved_docs.question: What digital marketing services do you offer?
retrieved_docs.answer: We offer a comprehensive range of services including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Pay-Per-Click advertising (PPC/Google Ads), Social Media Marketing and Management, Content Marketing, Email Marketing Campaigns, Website Design and Development, Brand Strategy Consulting, and detailed Monthly Analytics Reporting.

retrieved_docs.question: Can you redesign or build my website?
retrieved_docs.answer: Yes, we offer full website design and development services. We build responsive, SEO-ready websites on WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, and custom HTML/CSS/JS stacks. A standard 5-page business website takes 3–4 weeks. E-commerce stores typically take 5–8 weeks depending on the number of products. All websites include basic SEO setup, speed optimisation, and a 30-day post-launch support period.

retrieved_docs.question: Do you create content like blogs, videos, and graphics?
retrieved_docs.answer: Yes, content creation is a core service. We create SEO-optimised blog articles, social media graphics, short-form Reels/videos, infographics, email newsletters, and ad creatives. Our in-house team includes copywriters, graphic designers, and video editors. Content is always brand-aligned and reviewed before publishing.

response:
Yes, we offer Search Engine Optimization (SEO) services as part of our comprehensive digital marketing services. This includes setting up your website for SEO and providing monthly analytics reporting.

If you'd like more information or have specific questions about our SEO services, I'd be happy to connect you with our human support team who can provide more detailed information and guidance. You can reach us at support@pixelflow.in or +91 1234567890.

retrieved_docs.question: How much do your services cost?
retrieved_docs.answer: Our pricing is flexible and depends on your business goals. Our Starter Plan begins at ₹15,000/month, covering basic SEO and social media management for 2 platforms. The Growth Plan is ₹35,000/month and adds PPC management and content creation. Our Enterprise Plan starts at ₹75,000/month for full-service digital marketing. Custom packages are also available — contact us for a tailored quote.

retrieved_docs.question: How can I contact support or speak to someone?
retrieved_docs.answer: You can reach us in several ways: Email us at support@pixelflow.in for non-urgent queries (response within 24 hours). For urgent matters, WhatsApp or call us at +91-98765-43210 (Mon–Fri, 10am–6pm IST). Existing clients have access to a dedicated Slack channel for real-time communication with their account manager.
